summary: TWO_COLUMN: d(sin θ)/dθ = cos θ via unit circle. LEFT NumberPlane with BLUE unit circle, ORANGE radial line, YELLOW point P, GREEN y-coord segment (=sin θ), RED tangent arrow in direction (-sin θ, cos θ). ValueTracker theta_tr sweeps π/4 → 5π/6. RIGHT derivation: arc=dθ, tangent's y-component = cos θ.
